name: Spinach Dip (Crocker)
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
8 ounces Water chestnuts, drained and finely chopped
1 cup Finely chopped green onions (with tops)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
3. Serve with rye or rice crackers or raw vegetables if desired.
About 4 1/2 cups dip;10 calories per tablespoon.
